name: Beef and Vegetable Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Sweet Italian sausage links, sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the corn oil in a large, heavy kettle over medium heat.
2. Add the stewing beef and brown on all sides. Use a slotted spoon to remove the meat and set aside.
3. Add the sausage links to the kettle and brown on all sides.
4. Drain off the drippings from the kettle.
5. Stir in the tomatoes, water, chopped onion, salt, Worcestershire sauce, and reserved browned beef.
6. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low. Cover and simmer until the meat is nearly tender, about 1 hour and 30 minutes.
7. Add the cubed potatoes and sliced celery. Continue simmering until all vegetables and meat are tender, an additional 20 minutes.
